name: Quarter-Hour Sweet-n-Sour
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Cook the chicken pieces for 5 to 7 minutes, turning them once halfway through cooking.
3. Remove the chicken from the pan and drain on paper towels.
4. Add the frozen vegetables to the same pan and cook for 2 to 3 minutes.
5. Stir in the cooked rice, chicken, sweet and sour sauce, and salt.
6. Cook until everything is thoroughly heated, about 2 to 3 more minutes.
